TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Wsilung = Gaga mniq Tawyuensu Fusingcyu ka alang Wsilung. 70 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 211 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 82% niqan 172 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 18% niqan 39 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal74%, Amis2%, Cou2%, Paiwan1%, ni rahuq na o2%. Pnyahan bnatas
S.PHON: = wsiluŋ = gaga mniq tawjuənsu *usiŋʦju ka alaŋ wsiluŋ. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal**%, amis*%, ʦou*%, paiwan*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%. pnjaħan bnatas
S.FORM: = Wsilung = Gaga mniq Tawyuensu Fusingcyu ka alang Wsilung. 70 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 211 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 82% niqan 172 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 18% niqan 39 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal74%, Amis2%, Cou2%, Paiwan1%, ni rahuq na o2%. Pnyahan bnatas
S.PHON: = wsiluŋ = gaga mniq tawjuənsu *usiŋʦju ka alaŋ wsiluŋ. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal**%, amis*%, ʦou*%, paiwan*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%. pnjaħan bnatas
